outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to negative GEX (-6.5B total); dealers will accelerate moves.
outlook.summary: Market is in a negative gamma environment (-6.5B total) with heavy put hedging dominating the structure. Spot (654.24) is trapped between massive structural support at 650 and resistance at 660. The extreme Put/Call Ratios (up to 4.0) and 'smirk' skew indicate strong bearish sentiment, but negative gamma implies any breakdown will be violent. Max Pain at 657 suggests an upward magnetic pull if support holds.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest in all expiries (0DTE: 9.8k, Weekly: 23k, Monthly: 72k). Primary dealer hedge zone.
Significant Call OI concentration across 0DTE (13.8k) and Weekly (19.7k). Dealer selling zone.
Confluence of 0DTE and Weekly Max Pain (656-657). Attracts price to minimize option payouts.
Largest 0DTE Call OI (20,777). Immediate short-term resistance if 660 breaks.
Deep support with massive Weekly (112k) and Monthly (145k) Put OI. 'Final' downside buffer.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW - Positive GEX across all expiries suppresses volatility. Dealers long gamma will pin price action near current levels.
outlook.summary: Market positioned in a tight consolidation zone between Monthly Max Pain (24000) and 0DTE Max Pain (24090). The 24300 RESONANCE level acts as a magnetic ceiling across ALL expiries. Positive total GEX (1.63B combined) indicates dealer hedging will dampen volatility. Bearish smirk skew (1.23-1.48) confirms put protection demand, but positive gamma environment suggests mean-reversion to 24000-24100 range.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Same strike (24300/24330) is dominant CALL resistance in ALL 3 expiries. 0DTE OI:196, WEEKLY OI:213, MONTHLY OI:407. Structural ceiling with multi-expiry dealer gamma concentration.
Major PUT support across 0DTE (OI:379 - highest PUT) and MONTHLY (OI:259). High 0DTE volume (907) confirms active defense. Bearish skew validates support strength.
Monthly Gamma Flip at 24070.92 - spot is oscillating exactly at this inflection point. Price direction from here determines dealer hedging flow. Positive GEX confirms stability bias.
0DTE Max Pain at 24090 - only 27 points above spot. Market maker target zone. Combined with positive GEX creates powerful attraction force for intraday pinning.
MONTHLY massive CALL OI:4033 - highest single-strike concentration. Just 37 pts above spot. Dealers will sell rallies into this level. Confirms resistance zone with 24300.
MONTHLY Max Pain - psychological level and dealer target. Combined PUT OI:506 + CALL OI:256 creates balanced structure. Secondary magnet to 24090.
PUT support in 0DTE (OI:146) and WEEKLY (OI:210 - Weekly PUT WALL). Secondary support below 23500. High IV (0.35) indicates fear-based protection.
WEEKLY dominant CALL OI:545 - highest weekly concentration. Below spot creates soft floor. Dealers hedged long calls will support dips to this level.
MONTHLY major PUT OI:1007 - ultimate structural support. Deep OTM with high IV (0.32). Tail risk hedge zone. Only relevant on major selloff.
